name: simflow
description: Codex-native computational simulation domain workflow layer

interface.longDescription: SimFlow provides Codex skills and MCP tools for dry-run-first DFT, AIMD, and MD research workflows, including state, artifact, checkpoint, literature, structure, HPC planning, and parser utilities.
defaultPrompt: Use SimFlow to plan a VASP DFT workflow.
Use SimFlow to build a CP2K AIMD plan.
Use SimFlow to inspect simulation outputs.
